name: workglow
description: Workglow is a tool for building and running DAG pipelines.

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules packages/*/*tsbuildinfo packages/*/dist packages/*/src/**/*\.d\.ts packages/*/src/**/*\.map examples/*/node_modules examples/*/dist examples/*/src/**/*\.d\.ts examples/*/src/**/*\.map .turbo */*/.turbo
scripts.watch: turbo run build-package --force && turbo run watch --concurrency 15
scripts.watch:js: turbo run build-package --force --ui=stream && turbo run watch-js --concurrency 15 --ui=stream
scripts.watch:packages: concurrently --kill-others -c 'auto' -n util,storage,job-queue,task-graph,tasks,ai,provider,test,workflow 'cd packages/util && bun run watch' 'cd packages/storage && bun run watch' 'cd packages/job-queue && bun run watch' 'cd packages/task-graph && bun run watch' 'cd packages/tasks && bun run watch' 'cd packages/ai && bun run watch' 'cd packages/ai-provider && bun run watch' 'cd packages/test && bun run watch' 'cd packages/workflow && bun run watch'
scripts.test:bun:integration: bun scripts/test.ts bun integration graph task storage queue util mcp
scripts.test:bun:ai-provider: bun scripts/test.ts bun integration ai provider
scripts.test:bun:ai-provider-api: bun scripts/test.ts bun integration ai provider-api
scripts.test:vitest:integration: bun scripts/test.ts vitest integration graph task storage queue util mcp
scripts.test:vitest:ai-provider: bun scripts/test.ts vitest integration ai provider
scripts.test:vitest:ai-provider-api: bun scripts/test.ts vitest integration ai provider-api
scripts.test:bun:all: concurrently -c 'auto' -n 'unit,integration,rag,ai-provider,ai-provider-hft,ai-provider-llamacpp,ai-provider-api' 'bun run test:bun:unit' 'bun run test:bun:integration' 'bun run test:bun:rag' 'bun run test:bun:ai-provider' 'bun run test:bun:ai-provider-hft' 'bun run test:bun:ai-provider-llamacpp' 'bun run test:bun:ai-provider-api'
scripts.test:vitest:all: concurrently -c 'auto' -n 'unit,integration,rag,ai-provider,ai-provider-hft,ai-provider-llamacpp,ai-provider-api' 'bun run test:vitest:unit' 'bun run test:vitest:integration' 'bun run test:vitest:rag' 'bun run test:vitest:ai-provider' 'bun run test:vitest:ai-provider-hft' 'bun run test:vitest:ai-provider-llamacpp' 'bun run test:vitest:ai-provider-api'
scripts.publish-all: bun ./scripts/bunsrc-workspace.ts dist && bun run format && bun run build && bun run test && bun run bunset && bun run publish-login && bun run publish-workspaces
